description_long: This is a rectangular wooden picnic table set with six matching chairs, all crafted from a medium-toned wood with a visible grain pattern. The table features a flat, smooth tabletop supported by four sturdy, straight legs at each corner. Each chair has a high, slatted backrest and a flat seat, with slightly curved back legs for added stability and comfort. The set is designed for group dining or gatherings, offering ample seating and a spacious surface for food, drinks, or activities. The construction appears robust, suitable for both indoor and outdoor use, and the finish is matte, highlighting the natural wood texture. There is no visible umbrella hole in the center of the tabletop.
description: A rectangular wooden picnic table with six matching high-back chairs, all featuring a natural wood grain and sturdy construction.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full table surface and all six chairs, with three chairs on each long side.
description_view_1: Side view emphasizing the length of the table and the alignment of the chairs, with the tabletop's rectangular shape clearly visible.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, displaying the table and all six chairs from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view to view 1, again highlighting the table's length and the arrangement of the chairs.
attribute_tabletop_support_structure: The tabletop is supported by four straight, sturdy wooden legs positioned at each corner, providing stable and even support across the entire surface.
